name: SkillsBench
description: The first evaluation framework measuring how AI agent skills improve performance. Measures augmentation efficacy via paired evaluation across diverse tasks.
test_method: Tasks are evaluated under three conditions: no Skills, curated Skills, and self-generated Skills. Each task adopts a containerized structure with deterministic verification.
notes: Evaluates 86 real-world tasks across 11 domains. Curated Skills raise average pass rate by 16.2 percentage points, while self-generated Skills provide negligible or negative benefit.
